name: Acme Corp Proposal v3.docx
content: Proposal for the Acme Corp partnership covering Q3 deliverables: an 8-week API integration rollout, dedicated onboarding support, and a three-tier usage-based pricing model. Includes a support SLA and a proposed timeline for sign-off ahead of the quarterly review.

name: Acme Meeting Notes 2026-06.docx
content: Notes from last month's call with Sarah Chen at Acme Corp. Discussed high-level partnership scope, confirmed mutual interest in a Q3 integration timeline, and agreed Acme would draft the first proposal for review.

name: Q3 Budget.xlsx
content: Q3 budget breakdown by department. Engineering line item increased by 2 FTEs, new allocation added for the Acme Corp partnership integration costs, travel and offsite budget held flat versus Q2.

name: Out of Office - July.docx
content: Out of office notice: I will be away and largely unreachable starting in 6 days through 8 days from now. Please direct urgent matters to John Miller during this window. Will respond to non-urgent email upon return.

name: Istanbul trip itinerary.pdf
content: Trip itinerary for Istanbul. Flight TK1234 departing Istanbul (IST) for New York (JFK), PNR TK-ABC123. Hotel: Bosphorus View Hotel, 2 nights, check-in prior to departure, walking distance from Sultanahmet district.

name: 2025 Tax documents
content: Folder containing 2025 tax documents including income statements and deduction receipts.

name: Team offsite photos
content: Folder with photos from the last team offsite, shared with the wider team.

name: Onboarding checklist.pdf
content: Checklist for new hire onboarding covering account provisioning, laptop setup, VPN configuration, and first-week orientation schedule.

name: Marketing deck Q2.pptx
content: Q2 marketing performance deck covering campaign results, channel spend breakdown, and lead generation metrics for the quarter.

name: Personal reading list.docx
content: A running list of books and articles to read, organized by topic including distributed systems, product management, and travel writing.
